title: hypecoum aequilobum
intro: Hypecoum aequilobum, also known as White Lady or Hairy Hypecoum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and expectorant. The health benefits of Hypecoum aequilobum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of kidney stones. In herbal preparations, Hypecoum aequilobum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in various remedies.
